name: Josie Faith
tagline: When songs are so raw they become real.
bio: Hey there, my name is Josie, and I'm a self-recording singer-songwriter based in Brooklyn. I write my lyrics first: the songs start as thoughts or emotions I need to process out loud, and the music grows around them.

My first album, Raw, is exactly what it sounds like — emotional, damaged, a little rough around the edges. Every part of it was written, played, and recorded by me on subpar equipment while I was still learning how. Since then I've been experimenting with new genres, new tools, new emotions, and new motivations to build something real.
Whether you found this page from Spotify, YouTube, or an open mic somewhere in Brooklyn: hi, thanks for coming to listen.
